'''Jo'Ara Gier''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] technician working with the [[Cularin resistance]]. When the forces of the [[Metatheran Cartel]] attacked the resistance's base within the [[Cloud Mountain mines]] in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], it was Gier who discovered that one of the [[Datapad/Legends|datapads]] with Cartel information recently brought into the base was transmitting its location to the Cartel.

{{Char-stub}}

*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}} {{1st}}
